query:
-- The cloud computer log confirms run 1800001 completed successfully at 21:42 UTC with 13 projects
-- The DB shows it as failed because the cleanup job fired during a server restart at 21:25 UTC
-- Correct the record to reflect the actual outcome
UPDATE pipelineRuns
SET 
  status = 'completed',
  completedAt = '2026-06-07 21:42:54',
  projectsCreated = 13
WHERE id = 1800001
  AND status = 'failed';

-- Also correct run 1770001 which was a duplicate/orphaned run that started at 12:07 and was cleaned up
-- Leave that one as failed since it was genuinely interrupted
SELECT id, status, startedAt, completedAt, projectsCreated 
FROM pipelineRuns 
WHERE id IN (1800001, 1770001);
